docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAY, ANDRIA GEKSIM AS TO DEFENDANT AKIRA TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
